name: 抓頭髮/肢體拉扯
description: Blair抓著Michelle的頭髮施暴，以及Richard在公寓中抓住Michelle的手臂質問。肢體暴力直接展示權力不對等和角色的暴戾。
tags: 身體接觸的侵犯感讓觀眾產生即時的憤怒和保護欲

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Blair had me by the hair and Ruth tried to stop. ... You're hurting me. ... Answer the question. How long have you been screwing around behind my back? Get off of me.
examples.context: 身體接觸的侵犯感讓觀眾產生即時的憤怒和保護欲
